title: Share Link
feature: Encode grid state into a compact URL hash that can be shared. Decode on page load to restore layouts from links.

tasks.title: Grid State Encoding
tasks.description: Create encodeGridState() that converts the grid into a compact binary representation. Each cell gets 6 bits: 4 bits for type (0=empty, 1-7=track types, 8-16=scenery types) and 2 bits for rotation (0-3). Pack bits into bytes, Base64 encode with URL-safe alphabet (base64url). Handle trains separately with row,col,color. Handle switch states.
acceptance: Empty grid produces a valid (short) encoded string
All track types encoded correctly (straight, curve, tjunction, crossover, bridge, tunnel, station)
All scenery types encoded correctly (tree, house, cow, water, flower, sheep, horse, duck-land, people)
Rotation values 0/90/180/270 map to 2-bit values 0/1/2/3
Train positions and colors encoded
Switch states encoded

tasks.title: Grid State Decoding
tasks.description: Create decodeGridState(hash) that reverses the encoding. Parse the base64url string back into grid state, train positions, and switch states. Validate the data before applying (correct dimensions, valid types). Fall back gracefully on invalid/corrupt data.
acceptance: Decoding an encoded state produces identical grid
Invalid/corrupt hash data handled gracefully (no crash, shows toast)
Old page loads without hash work normally (no regression)
Missing fields default correctly (no trains, no switches)

tasks.title: Share Link Button in UI
tasks.description: Add a 🔗 Share button in the controls bar (next to 📸 Screenshot). On click: encode current state, build URL with hash, copy to clipboard, show toast. Use navigator.clipboard.writeText() with fallback.
acceptance: 🔗 button visible in controls bar
Click copies URL to clipboard
Toast shows '🔗 Link copied!'
URL hash is readable (not excessively long for a typical layout)
Button disabled or hidden during puzzle mode

tasks.title: Hash Detection on Page Load
tasks.description: On init(), check window.location.hash. If present and starts with expected prefix, decode and load the layout instead of auto-save. Show a toast: '📂 Loaded shared layout!' Then clear the hash from URL bar (using history.replaceState) to prevent re-loading on refresh.
acceptance: Share link loads layout in new browser/incognito
Regular page loads (no hash) still auto-restore from localStorage
Hash is cleared from URL after loading so refresh uses auto-save
Loading a shared layout doesn't overwrite existing save slots

tasks.title: Keyboard Shortcut + Shortcuts Modal Update
tasks.description: Add 'L' keyboard shortcut to trigger share link copy. Add the shortcut to the shortcuts modal HTML.
acceptance: L key copies share link (same as clicking button)
Shortcuts modal shows the new L shortcut
L shortcut blocked during play, in modals, in inputs

tasks.title: CSS for Share Button
tasks.description: Style the share button consistently with other control buttons. No new modal needed — just a button click action.
acceptance: Button styled consistently with screenshot/save buttons
Works in both day and night modes
Visible on mobile layout

testingFocus: Encode → Decode roundtrip with complex layouts (all track types, scenery, multiple trains, switches)
URL length for typical 12x8 grid (should be well under 500 chars)
Share link works in incognito (different browser context)
Normal page load without hash still works (auto-restore)
Mobile layout: button accessible in controls bar
